name: NVIDIA CORP NVIDIA ORD SHS
summary: NVIDIA Corporation is a technology company that designs and manufactures graphics processing units (GPUs), as well as system-on-a-chip units (SoCs) for the gaming, professional visualization, data center, and automotive markets. The company's products are used in a wide range of applications, including gaming, artificial intelligence, and autonomous vehicles. NVIDIA is headquartered in Santa Clara, California, USA.
